sap-qm-course.metaTitle: SAP QM Course | SAP QM Training with Placement – NXGEN
sap-qm-course.metaDescription: Learn SAP QM Course at NXGEN Tech Academy. Get hands-on SAP training, certification guidance, internship, and 100% job support to build a career in SAP Quality Management.
sap-qm-course.whatIs:
Are you looking to build expertise in SAP Quality Management (SAP QM) and unlock high-paying career opportunities in the SAP ecosystem? The SAP QM Course at NXGEN Tech Academy is designed to help students and professionals gain industry-relevant skills in quality management processes using SAP ERP and SAP S/4HANA.

SAP QM (Quality Management) is a core module in SAP ERP that helps organizations maintain high product and service quality throughout their business operations. It enables companies to automate inspection processes, manage quality notifications, and ensure compliance with international standards such as ISO and FDA.
sap-qm-course.whyCourse:
Choosing the SAP QM Course at NXGEN Tech Academy can significantly improve your career prospects. Quality management plays a critical role in industries such as manufacturing, pharmaceuticals, automotive, and consumer goods.

SAP QM enables organizations to maintain consistent product quality by integrating quality checks throughout the production and procurement processes. With knowledge gained from the SAP QM training program, professionals can identify and prevent quality issues early, maintain compliance with industry regulations, and enhance customer satisfaction and brand reputation.
keyBenefits: Comprehensive training on latest SAP S/4HANA technologies
Hands-on SAP system practice on live servers
One-on-one mentoring and interactive doubt-clearing sessions
SAP QM training certificate from NXGEN Tech Academy
Internship opportunities to gain practical experience
100% job support including resume and interview preparation
whyChooseNxGen: Industry-oriented training for real career opportunities
Live doubt-clearing sessions and practical examples
Lifetime access to Learning Management System (LMS)
Recorded lectures and updated study materials
Free access to live SAP servers for practice
Proven track record of placement assistance
Expert-led training with real implementation experience
keyTopics: Integration with SAP MM, PP, and PM
sap-qm-course.feesAndDuration:
Our SAP QM classes offer flexible learning schedules with weekday and weekend batches suitable for both students and working professionals.

The course includes lifetime access to the LMS, recorded lectures, assignments, and practice scenarios. Students also receive free SAP server access for hands-on practice.

For detailed fee structure and upcoming batch schedules, please register for a counseling session with our training advisors.
sap-qm-course.conclusion: Start your SAP QM career with NXGEN Tech Academy today. Our practical training, certification guidance, and career support provide the right foundation for a global SAP career in quality management.

sap-sd-course-training.metaTitle: SAP SD Course | Training with Placement – NxGen Tech Academy
sap-sd-course-training.metaDescription: Join SAP SD course at NxGen Tech Academy. Learn sales order processing, billing, pricing, and SAP skills with expert training and placement support
sap-sd-course-training.whatIs:
The SAP SD Course at NXGEN Tech Academy is designed to provide a complete understanding of sales processes, order management, pricing, shipping, and billing using SAP S/4HANA.
This SAP SD Course Curriculum covers the entire Order-to-Cash (O2C) business cycle, including sales order processing, delivery management, billing integration with finance, and advanced reporting. Through this structured SAP SD Course Curriculum, students gain both functional knowledge and hands-on SAP system experience.
sap-sd-course-training.whyCourse:
The SAP SD Course Curriculum prepares learners for careers as SAP SD consultants, business analysts, and ERP professionals by focusing on real business scenarios and industry best practices.
Thousands of companies worldwide rely on SAP systems to manage their business processes. SAP SD professionals are highly valued because they help organizations manage their sales operations efficiently.
Professionals with SAP SD skills often receive attractive salary packages due to their specialized ERP knowledge and business process expertise.
keyBenefits: Configure enterprise structure and master data in SAP SD
Manage sales orders, deliveries, and billing processes
Integrate SAP SD with other modules such as MM, FI, and PP
Analyze sales performance using reporting and analytics tools
Hands-on SAP system practice with real-time projects
sap-sd-course-training.feesAndDuration:
Enroll in our SAP SD Course to gain top-tier SAP expertise with affordable fees and flexible schedules. NXGEN Tech Academy is a leading SAP SD training institute that offers competitive pricing.
Duration: 45 Days (Live Interactive Sessions)
Batch Type: Weekday (Mon-Fri) & Weekend (Sat-Sun)
Certification Assistance: We provide step-by-step guidance for SAP SD certification.
sap-sd-course-training.conclusion: The SAP SD Course Curriculum at NXGEN Tech Academy is the ultimate pathway to becoming a skilled SAP SD professional. Enroll now to take the first step toward a successful ERP career.

topics: Introduction to SAP ERP and S/4HANA

Copy control at header, item, and schedule line levels
managing incomplete logs in sales documents

Creating Condition Tables, Access Sequences, and Condition Types
Defining Pricing Procedures and determination rules
Configuring discounts, surcharges, and freight charges
Working with tax determination and free goods processing
Defining shipping points and loading points
Delivery document types and item categories
Picking, packing, and Goods Issue (PGI) processes
Routes and stage determination in shipping
Monitoring outbound delivery and stock availability
Billing document types and invoice generation
Integration of SAP SD with Finance (FI), Materials (MM), and Production (PP)
Handling credit memos and debit memos
Credit Management and Risk Management in S/4HANA
Processing Returns and Credit/Debit Note requests
Intercompany sales and stock transport orders (STO)
